title: FYI ГўВҖВ” April 2025
body_text:
FYI ГўВҖВ” April 2025
FYI ГўВ”ВҖ April 2025
The following updates were made to the Payment Solutions Manual.
Clearing and Deposits Volume
Online Return System (ORS) Part
Section 14.3, Uploading Files to ORS via Central 1ГўВҖВҷs FTP Server
We removed instructions on uploading files via an automated script. This section was updated to include instructions on how to upload files via CentralВ 1ГўВҖВҷs FTP server instead.
